final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering style are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部：中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧：结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上：材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中：纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部：穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实人物全身站姿) as central subject, wearing the most representative 中国少数民族服饰 — specific ethnic group and garment system auto-selected for maximum visual richness and structural complexity; must include labeled structural breakdown of all key garment components (关键部件), local detail close-ups, material texture swatches, pattern samples (纹样样本), and a color palette panel
Scene/backdrop: must be a paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, evoking archival museum display board
Lighting/mood: needs a scholarly, restrained, collectible-quality atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a palette anchored by the authentic colors of the selected 少数民族服饰, complemented by the warm neutral background — exact ratios and accent tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs genuine-looking fabric texture rendering (silk, embroidery, woven patterns) for swatches — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all in-image text in 简体中文 only — including: 主标题、副标题、导语、所有引线标注、材质说明、纹样寓意说明、色彩含义说明、核心特征总结; no English, no pinyin, no romanization, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve complete 文博图鉴 layout structure with all five zones visible; all annotations must be legible, well-spaced, and structurally accurate; garment structure and component labels must reflect real ethnographic accuracy of the chosen 少数民族服饰
Avoid: 海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感; avoid decorative excess, blurry text, incorrect structural labels, fake textures, misplaced annotations, English or pinyin text
